creator: sergey@network-asp.biz
text:
Sorry for long delay.

Please, commit 'ports/104477' with this addition:

-----
NOT_FOR_ARCHS=amd64 sparc64
NOT_FOR_ARCHS_REASON_amd64=Fails to compile (http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.5.2006091709/mysql++-mysql50-2.1.1.log)
NOT_FOR_ARCHS_REASON_sparc64=Fails to compile (http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/sparc64-errorlogs/e.5.2006091522/mysql++-mysql50-2.1.1.log)
-----

I have no access to this architectures, so I can't test/fix this bugs.

P.S. I'm not longer interested in mysql++. If anybody wants to support
it further I'll pass my maintainership.
